evals.prompt: Create a tmux configuration file (.tmux.conf) with vim-style keybindings for pane navigation, a custom status bar showing session name and time, mouse support, and configuration for tmux-resurrect plugin to persist sessions across reboots.
expectations: Sets vim-style keybindings (hjkl or similar) for pane navigation
Configures a custom status bar with session info
Enables mouse support with set -g mouse on
Includes tmux-resurrect or tmux-continuum plugin configuration
Sets a reasonable prefix key (C-a or C-b)
Includes sensible defaults like increased history limit

evals.prompt: Create a zellij layout configuration file (KDL format) for a development workflow with three panes: a main editor pane taking 70% width on the left, and two stacked panes on the right for running tests (top) and a shell (bottom). Include tab configuration for switching between project contexts.
evals.expected_output: Zellij layout file in KDL format
expectations: Uses valid KDL syntax for zellij layouts
Defines a layout with three panes
Configures pane size ratios (70/30 or similar split)
Includes a main editor pane on the left
Has stacked panes on the right side
Defines tabs or includes tab-related configuration
